commentaries.author: Bede
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh So I came to Jerusalem, and was there three days. And the people blessed the men that willingly offered themselves to settle in Jerusalem. We too should make the sublime life of the elect, which we cannot follow by imitating it, ours by praising and venerating it. 6 It should be noted according to the true record of sacred history that there were no others who are said to have settled in Jerusalem than those who were from the tribe of Judah and Benjamin and the Lévites. 1 For it clearly goes on:.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
